## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] If adding a processor: it sets `priority`, `hook_patterns`, `name`, `can_handle`, `process`
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
